biggest_leak: No live email delivery — no custom domain → Brevo cannot authenticate sender (DKIM/DMARC missing). Even if Razorpay fires, customer never receives the product.

action_taken.summary: Bootstrap of /context/ folder + v3 agent prompt + universal resume prompt. No customer-facing changes.

approval_requests.reasoning: Unblocks Brevo sender auth + professional email

blockers: BREVO_API_KEY is wrong type (OAuth, need SMTP v3 xkeysib-)
GA4_PROPERTY_ID is G- measurement ID, need numeric
tomorrow_focus: Switch Brevo key to SMTP v3
